problem id: 499c7735
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  11010111 -> 11111010
  10111101 -> 11110111
  01111010 -> 11001111
  11101001 -> 01111101
  00011100 -> 10000011
  01101010 -> 11001101
  11011001 -> 01111011
  11011100 -> 10011011
  01110100 -> 10001110

query: 11001100
predicted answer: 10011001
